title: WARN[0000] Failed to detect the owner for the current cgroup: stat /sys/fs/cgroup/systemd: no such file or directory
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

I'm following [this](https://www.redhat.com/sysadmin/podman-windows-wsl2) for WSL2 installation. When I run `podman info` I got `WARN[0000] Failed to detect the owner for the current cgroup: stat /sys/fs/cgroup/systemd: no such file or directory ` but I can pull and run Nginx image normally.

If I run with sudo the warning is gone.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version
WARN[0000] Failed to detect the owner for the current cgroup: stat /sys/fs/cgroup/systemd: no such file or directory 
Version:      3.1.2
API Version:  3.1.2
Go Version:   go1.14.7
Built:        Thu Jan  1 07:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```
